title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review September 2024
content:
Key Highlights

Canada CFR
  • Canada CFR Price was around C$172.50 for CC2 credits and C$160 for CC3 credits in September.
CA LCFS
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price rose 9.41% MoM in September.
  • Monthly credit transactions declined further by 95.39% MoM in September.
  • The average broker prices moved from $57.00/MT to $67.08/MT at month-end.
BC LCFS
  • BC LCFS monthly trading witnessed an 85.71% decline in August.
  • The average credit price under BC LCFS bounced back by 69.77% MoM, reaching $256.37.
OR CFP
  • In August, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 88.20% compared to July.
  • OR CFP trading activity in August fell by 68.60% as 84.42k credits were transferred.
WA CFS
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS recovered slightly (+5.87% MoM) after 21.02% MoM fall last month.
  • For August, a total of 84,431 credits were traded across 20 transfers.
US RFS
  • In August, D3 and D4 RIN Prices increased while D5 and D6 Prices decreased.
  • RIN Generation and transaction volumes of RINs declined by 18.98% and 43.46% MoM respectively.
author: Mansift Kaur
